article.title: Japan’s Prediction Market Startups Use Loyalty Points to Bypass Gambling Ban
article.summary: Homegrown platforms, banned from real-money gambling, are tapping the country’s loyalty-point culture to build an alternative to Polymarket.
article.title_zh: 日本預測市場新創公司利用忠誠積分規避賭博禁令
article.summary_zh: 本土平台因被禁止進行真金賭博，正在利用日本的忠誠積分文化來打造 Polymarket 的替代方案。

article.title: Google Meet’s Gemini-powered ‘Take notes for me’ comes to Google AI Pro, Ultra
article.summary: Following Workspace availability in 2024 , “Take notes for me” in Google Meet is now available for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers.
article.title_zh: Google Meet 的 Gemini 動力「為我記筆記」功能現已支援 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra
article.summary_zh: 繼 2024 年在 Workspace 上推出後，Google Meet 的「為我記筆記」功能現已提供給 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 訂閱用戶使用。

article.title: Samsung, SK Hynix to Build Two Chip Fabs in $518 Billion Project
article.title_zh: 三星、SK 海力士將在 518 億美元項目中建造兩座晶片廠

article.title: Google Cloud to Offer Specialist AI Models for Science Research
article.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google will start offering specialist artificial intelligence models from software company SandboxAQ through its cloud service, expanding enterprise and research access to technology designed to accelerate drug discovery, materials science and semiconductor manufacturing.
article.title_zh: Google Cloud 將為科學研究提供專業 AI 模型
article.summary_zh: 字母公司的 Google 將開始通過其雲服務提供軟體公司 SandboxAQ 的專業人工智慧模型，擴展企業和研究對設計用於加速藥物發現、材料科學和半導體製造技術的訪問。

article.title: FT Reports That Apple Is Lobbying to Buy Memory Chips From Blacklisted Chinese Company CXMT
article.title_zh: 英國金融時報報導 Apple 遊說購買被列入黑名單的中國公司 CXMT 的記憶體晶片

article.title: WhatsApp username reservations are now open, here’s how to claim yours
article.summary: Following years of anticipation and months of preparation , WhatsApp today began rolling out username reservations worldwide, allowing users to claim a unique name before the privacy-focused feature launches later this year. Here are the details.
article.title_zh: WhatsApp 用戶名預留現已開放，以下是如何領取的方法
article.summary_zh: 經過多年期待和數月準備，WhatsApp 今日開始在全球推出用戶名預留功能，允許用戶在隱私保護功能今年稍後推出前領取獨特的用戶名。

article.title: T-Mobile confirms it is killing your old plan, making some users pay more (Updated: More details)
article.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR In a statement shared with us, T-Mobile has confirmed it is retiring its oldest plans from the 3G and 4G eras and transitioning customers to modern plans. Some customers could see an increase in their monthly bill. All customers are promised that they will keep their current benefits. The company has not yet confirmed which plans are being retired, and which plans users are being moved to. Update, June 29, 2026 (09:20 AM ET): T-Mobile has further clarified to us that the average adjustment is $4 per line. Customers will see the change on their next bill cycle starting in mid-July. The company isn’t sharing details on which specific plans are being retired, but customers who have an adjustment will receive a text from the carrier by the end of th
article.title_zh: T-Mobile 確認正在終止你的舊方案，部分用戶面臨漲價
article.summary_zh: T-Mobile 已確認將停用其 3G 和 4G 時代的最舊方案，並將客戶轉移至現代方案，部分客戶月費可能上升，所有客戶承諾不會被強制轉換。

article.title: Firmus expands to Indonesia through AI access deal with Nvidia
article.summary: The 360MW data center under construction in Batam will house up to 170,000 Nvidia accelerator chips. The facility is expected to be operational by the first quarter of 2027.
article.title_zh: Firmus 透過與 Nvidia AI 合作協議擴展至印尼
article.summary_zh: 位於巴淡島的 360MW 數據中心將容納最多 170,000 個 Nvidia 加速器晶片,預計於 2027 年第一季投入運營。

article.title: Telcos have 'every right to play' in digital sovereignty – panel
article.summary: During an STL Partners webinar, panelists from Vodafone Business and Red Hat explored the role that telcos can and should be playing in the field of AI, cloud and data sovereignty, despite hyperscaler dominance.
article.title_zh: 電信運營商「有權參與」數位主權 – 專家小組
article.summary_zh: 在 STL Partners 網路研討會期間,Vodafone Business 和 Red Hat 的代表探討了儘管超大型雲端供應商佔據主導地位,電信運營商在 AI、雲端和數據主權領域應發揮的角色。

article.title: BT and Verizon merge international arms in $4bn global enterprise JV
article.summary: BT and Verizon are combining international enterprise units into a 50/50 JV serving 3,000 customers across 180 countries, streamlining global connectivity services while letting both firms sharpen their focus on domestic markets and AI network demand. In sum – what…
article.title_zh: BT 和 Verizon 在 40 億美元全球企業 JV 中合併國際業務
article.summary_zh: BT 和 Verizon 正將國際企業部門合併成一家 50/50 合資企業,為遍佈 180 個國家的 3,000 客戶提供服務,同時簡化全球連接服務並使雙方能夠專注於國內市場和 AI 網路需求。

article.title: Usernames Are Coming to WhatsApp Soon. Here's How to Reserve Yours
article.summary: Even if you only use WhatsApp sometimes, you might want to snag your username now to stop giving out your phone number.
article.title_zh: WhatsApp 即將推出用戶名功能。以下是如何預留你的用戶名
article.summary_zh: 即使你只是偶爾使用 WhatsApp，你也可能想現在就搶先預留用戶名，以避免洩露你的電話號碼。
